name: fitness-ai
description: Fitness Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_workout
tools.description: Generate a complete workout plan tailored to goals and equipment.

tools.name: track_calories
tools.description: Track daily calorie and macronutrient intake from food entries.

tools.name: calculate_body_composition
tools.description: Calculate BMI, body fat estimate, BMR, and TDEE.

tools.name: build_training_plan
tools.description: Build a multi-week training program with periodization.

tools.name: check_exercise_form
tools.description: Get exercise form cues, common mistakes, and muscle activation info.
